name: InputMediaLivePhoto
description: Represents a live photo to be sent.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the result, must be live_photo

fields.name: media
fields.description: Video of the live photo to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended) or pass “attach://<file_attach_name>” to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files ». Sending live photos by a URL is currently unsupported.

fields.name: photo
fields.description: The static photo to send. Pass a file_id to send a file that exists on the Telegram servers (recommended) or pass “attach://<file_attach_name>” to upload a new one using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name> name. More information on Sending Files ». Sending live photos by a URL is currently unsupported.

fields.name: caption
fields.description: Caption of the live photo to be sent, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing

fields.name: parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the live photo caption. See formatting options for more details.

fields.name: caption_entities
fields.description: List of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

fields.name: show_caption_above_media
fields.description: Pass True, if the caption must be shown above the message media

fields.name: has_spoiler
fields.description: Pass True if the live photo needs to be covered with a spoiler animation
